case_title: MARTI SOUSANIS VS. CITY &COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY SOUSANIS, MARTI AS TO DEFENDANT CITY &COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOUSANIS, MARTI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY &COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE THAT MUNI WAS AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-23-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY &COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOUSANIS, MARTI ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY SOUSANIS, MARTI CITY &COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY &COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. PLAIMTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.
